official coding engines."><link rel="icon" href="/favicon.ico" type="image/x-icon" sizes="64x64"><script>(() => {
  try {
    const savedLang = localStorage.getItem("teamo.router.language");
    const cookieLang = document.cookie
      .split("; ")
      .find((item) => item.startsWith("teamo_router_language="))
      ?.split("=")[1];
    const browserLang = navigator.language;
    const nextLang =
      savedLang === "en" || savedLang === "zh-CN"
        ? savedLang
        : cookieLang === "en" || cookieLang === "zh-CN"
          ? cookieLang
          : browserLang.toLowerCase().includes("zh")
            ? "zh-CN"
            : "en";
    if (nextLang === "en" || nextLang === "zh-CN") {
      document.documentElement.lang = nextLang;
    }
  } catch {}
})();</script><script src="/_next/static/chunks/polyfills-42372ed130431b0a.js" nomodule=""></script><link rel="preload" href="/_next/static/media/36966cca54120369-s.p.woff2" as="font" crossorigin="" type="font/woff2"><link rel="preload" href="/_next/static/media/bb3ef058b751a6ad-s.p.woff2" as="font" crossorigin="" type="font/woff2"><link rel="preload" href="/_next/static/media/e4af272ccee01ff0-s.p.woff2" as="font" crossorigin="" type="font/woff2"><link rel="preload" href="/_next/static/media/edef1a271f97a8ec-s.p.woff2" as="font" crossorigin="" type="font/woff2"><style id="feedback-tool-styles-annotation-popup-css-styles">.styles-module__popup___IhzrD svg[fill=none] {
